resultList.dtldesc: Discover the perfect blend of space and comfort in this beautiful 3 BHK house for sale in Tukkuguda, Hyderabad! With its wide layout and modern amenities, this home is ideal for families seeking a vibrant community to live in.::::::::::::Property Specifications::::::::::::Covering a super area of 2418 sq ft and a carpet area of 2400 sqft, this semi-furnished house is designed to fit your lifestyle with an atmosphere of warmth and welcome. With a well-planned layout comprising ground plus first floor design, this house is a home of beauty and comfort. At ground level, there is one large bedroom, a shared western bathroom, a pleasant living room, and a dining room, as well as a servant room and a standard kitchen complete with an internal staircase for convenient access to the top floor.::::::::::::The ground floor has two more bedrooms, both with en-suite bathrooms with modern western fittings and space for geysers. Relax in the fresh air from two balconies-one belonging to a bedroom and a shared balcony facing the road view. The utility space joined to the kitchen provides functionality, while sophisticated vitrified tiles add to the overall beauty of the house.::::::::::::Facilities::::::::::::This property comes with a range of modern comforts to ensure that you feel secure and comfortable. It has one covered parking space and one open parking space for your ease. You can enjoy peace of mind with 24-hour water supply and 100% power backup facility. The property also comes with a dedicated security guard and CCTV camera watch for a safe living environment for you and your loved ones.::::::::::::Locality::::::::::::Located conveniently near Lemoore Road, this property has nearby basic facilities that make everyday living comfortable. Kids will appreciate the proximity to schools and hospitals, both of which are within 3 km, making schooling and medical treatment readily accessible. Shopping is convenient as well with malls and supermarkets within the campus.::::::::::::There are plenty of public transport facilities within 2 km, along with banks and ATMs to serve your financial needs. Additionally, the Fhalaknama railway station is at a distance of 20 km, so traveling longer distances won't be difficult. Don't miss the chance to convert this space of wide and friendly flat into your own home in Tukkuguda!

resultList.dtldesc: Experience spacious and comfortable living with this well designed 4 BHK apartment located in the premium residential project SLN Signature in Kompally, Hyderabad. Spread across a super built up area of 2800 sq. ft with an expansive carpet area of 2700 sq. ft, this ready to move residence offers generous living spaces ideal for modern families. Positioned on the 3rd floor of a 10 storey building, the west facing apartment enjoys pleasant views of the surrounding garden and main road while providing excellent ventilation and natural light.Property SpecificationsThis unfurnished apartment features four spacious bedrooms, three well appointed bathrooms, and two balconies that enhance airflow and daylight throughout the home. The layout is thoughtfully planned to maximise space and functionality, including a dedicated puja room that adds convenience for traditional living. The flooring is finished with elegant vitrified tiles that offer durability and easy maintenance. Situated on the 3rd floor of a 10 floor building, the apartment is part of a freehold property and is ready for immediate occupancy, allowing buyers to customise interiors according to their preferences.FacilitiesThe residential complex provides essential amenities designed for comfortable and secure living. Residents benefit from lift access including service or goods lifts for convenience, visitor parking facilities for guests, and a jogging and strolling track that supports a healthy lifestyle. Additional services such as laundry facilities further enhance everyday convenience within the community.LocalityKompally is one of the rapidly developing residential hubs in North Hyderabad, known for its peaceful environment and excellent connectivity. The area is well connected to major parts of the city through National Highway 44 and the Outer Ring Road. Educational institutions, hospitals, supermarkets, and entertainment centres are easily accessible from the locality. The apartment is conveniently located near St Anns School, making it particularly suitable for families with children while ensuring easy access to daily necessities and essential services.
